title: Domestic fixtures released by Cricket South Africa
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - Cricket South Africa yesterday announced that the Division 1 T20 Challenge will take place from 27 September to 27 October, with the knock-out stage featuring two qualifiers and an eliminator.


> The Division 2 T20 Knock-out will run from 21 September to 20 October.


The Domestic 4-Day Series is scheduled to start on 30 October and culminate in a five-day final from 10-14 April.

The One-Day Cup will get underway in February.

Read original story on www.sacricketmag.com

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
